address: 1-8 The Broadway, Perry Barr, Birmingham, B20 3EA
notes: British Summer Time begins on 29 March, clocks go forward by one hour. Zohr Jama'at is 1:00PM daily (1:15PM on Fridays for Jumuah). On Sunday after Zuhr salah, Dars-e-Quraan will take place in Urdu. Jumuah Bayaan starts half an hour before Khutbah.
